case_title: JASON R HAMILTON VS. INNOVATION DESIGN ENGINEERING ANIMATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, JASON R AS TO DEFENDANT INNOVATION DESIGN ENGINEERING ANIMATION CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION GUPTA, AJAY AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
